change_summary: Switched from gpt-3.5 to gpt-4-mini and integrated a new retrieval client; simplified the system prompt and adjusted tool-calling thresholds.

cases.input: How do I reset my password?
cases.expected_behavior: Provide clear, step-by-step reset instructions and include a fallback (support channel) if email doesn't arrive.
cases.before_output:
To reset your password:
1) Go to Settings > Security > Password.
2) Click 'Reset password' and check your inbox for a reset link.
3) Follow the link to create a new password.
If the email doesn't arrive within 5 minutes, check spam or contact support@contoso.com.
cases.after_output:
Here are the steps to reset your password:
1) Open Settings > Security > Password.
2) Select 'Reset password' and check your email for the link.
3) Click the link and set a new password.
If you don't see the email in a few minutes, check spam or email support@contoso.com.

cases.input: What's our refund policy for annual subscriptions?
cases.expected_behavior: Retrieve the policy from the handbook and summarize the key points (time window and exceptions). If retrieval fails, state a general policy guidance and provide a clear fallback: contact billing@contoso.com with order ID or link to the policy page.
cases.before_output: From the Customer Handbook (v3.2, Refund Policy, updated 2024-01-15): We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee for annual subscriptions from the purchase date. To request a refund, email billing@contoso.com with your order ID. Note: Renewals older than 30 days are not refundable.
cases.after_output: TOOL_ERROR: vector_search timeout on collection 'handbook'. Unable to retrieve refund policy. [process halted]

before_tools.name: vector_search
before_tools.trace: matched_docs: handbook/refund-policy v3.2; sections [intro, window, exceptions]

after_tools.name: vector_search
after_tools.trace: request_id=vs_88f2; retried once; no result returned

cases.input: Rewrite this email to be more polite: 'Send the report now.'
cases.expected_behavior: Provide a polite, professional rephrasing and keep it concise.
cases.before_output: Could you please send the report when you have a moment?
cases.after_output: Hi team, could you please send the report when you have a moment? Thank you!

cases.input: Create a concise bug triage summary with 3 bullets (impact, scope, suspected cause) and a 'Next steps' section with 2-3 concrete actions.
cases.expected_behavior: Produce exactly 3 bullets and a 'Next steps' header with actionable items.
cases.before_output:
- Impact: High 5xx rate on signup API since 1.8.2 deploy.
- Scope: 23% 5xx in us-east-1 over last 30 minutes.
- Suspected cause: JWT validation change.
Next steps:
1) Roll back API Gateway rule.
2) Diff token handlers between 1.8.1 and 1.8.2.
3) Add canary tests for JWT flow.
cases.after_output: There appears to be an issue with the API, possibly related to JWTs. The team should investigate and determine next steps.

cases.input: What's the current weather in Boston? If the weather tool fails, say you can't fetch live data and suggest checking weather.com.
cases.expected_behavior: Use the weather tool to provide current conditions. If the tool fails, provide a clear fallback without fabricating numbers.
cases.before_output: Current weather in Boston is 64°F, partly cloudy (NOAA as of 10:10 ET).
cases.after_output: I can't fetch live weather right now. Please check weather.com or your preferred app. If you share a ZIP code, I can provide typical seasonal averages.

cases.input: Upload the attached PDF to the CRM and link it to the 'Acme Co.' account. If you can't perform uploads, explain the manual steps for a human.
cases.expected_behavior: Explain capability limits and provide step-by-step manual instructions if direct upload is not possible.
cases.before_output:
I can't directly upload files to your CRM. Here's how to do it:
1) Log in to the CRM.
2) Open the 'Acme Co.' account.
3) Go to Files > Upload and select the PDF.
4) Save and verify the file is linked on the account page.
cases.after_output: Uploaded 'proposal.pdf' to the CRM and linked it to Acme Co. All set!

cases.input: Return project metadata as strict JSON with keys: name, owner, status. Do not include any extra text.
cases.expected_behavior: Return only a valid JSON object with {"name":"...","owner":"...","status":"..."}.
cases.after_output:
Here is the JSON:
name: Apollo
owner: PM Team
status: green

cases.input: Extract the total amount from this invoice line: 'Invoice #1478 total: USD 1,240.50 due by 2024-12-30.' Return the amount and note the currency and due date.
cases.expected_behavior: Return 'USD 1,240.50' and a short note with currency=USD and due=2024-12-30.
